prompt: 你幫我看 mini 2 esp32 跟stm32 的 app 來的 save preset  跟 load preset 跟 reactor 有甚麼不一樣 記得 update 到最新的 repo

input.description: Fetch and check ahead/behind for repos
List repo root and recent git log

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && git status && echo "===DIFF STAT===" && git diff --stat
input.description: Show git status and working-tree changes

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt && git branch --show-current && echo "---STRUCTURE---" && ls -la && echo "---MAIN---" && ls -la main/ 2>/dev/null; ls -la src/ 2>/dev/null; ls -la components/ 2>/dev/null
cd /d/mybot/git/pg-reactor-esp32-wifi-bt && git branch --show-current && echo "---STRUCTURE---" && ls -la && echo "---MAIN---" && ls -R main 2>/dev/null | head -100
